variants.name: raw_eng
variants.label: Raw stitching + MMS-English
variants.description: No normalization. English words go to MMS-English model. You'll hear two distinct voices but natural English pronunciation.

variants.name: raw_phonetic
variants.label: Raw stitching + Hindi phonetic English
variants.description: No normalization. English words phonetically mapped to Devanagari and spoken by MMS-Hindi. One consistent voice, Indian-accented English.

variants.name: normalized_eng
variants.label: RMS normalized + MMS-English
variants.description: Volume-matched between models. English words go to MMS-English. Reduces loudness jumps. Two voices but at same volume level.

variants.name: normalized_phonetic
variants.label: RMS normalized + Hindi phonetic English
variants.description: Volume-matched. English words phonetically spoken by MMS-Hindi. One voice, Indian accent, volume consistent throughout.

variants.name: tuned_eng
variants.label: VITS tuned + MMS-English
variants.description: VITS noise/length parameters tuned per model + brightness matching. Tries to blend two model voices toward common speaking style. English words from MMS-English.

variants.name: tuned_phonetic
variants.label: VITS tuned + Hindi phonetic English
variants.description: VITS tuned parameters + brightness matching + phonetic English. One Hindi speaker throughout, tuned for consistency. Best shot at a natural unified voice.
